classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为电机外形轮廓与前出轴、键槽、端面连接器位置的工程尺寸图，包含'36'、'7'、'8'、'Ø110'、'Ø22'、'55±1'、'154±1.5'等尺寸及'0.08 A'、'0.04'形位公差和基准'A'，未显示针脚功能定义或性能曲线，因此归入机械尺寸。

Added space between words from OCR merged text.

Corrected 09 to Ø9 diameter notation.

Corrected OCR text to include visible square symbol.

ENCODER CONNECTOR translated as 编码器连接器.

Callout uses standard quantity-diameter format and points to the mounting holes.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是动力线接线表，表中可见'动力线 Power'、'Pin No'、'Defintion'、U/V/W/PE、线色'白 WHITE'、'红 RED'、'黑 BLACK'、'黄绿 YEL/GRN'以及线径'16AWG'，明确给出动力线引线号与相线、保护地和颜色的对应关系。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是左侧接线表中的表头文字，显示'连接器型号'及英文'Connector Models'， full source 中该区域对应连接器型号列标题，仅表示连接器型号信息，没有针脚功能、线色或接线定义，因此最接近机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标图是圆形动力连接器的端面结构图，标注了型号 'CMS3102A20-18PE00A-A'；结合全图左上角同一型号所在的动力连接器表格，可对应到带有针号、定义和颜色说明的动力接口针脚分配信息，因此归入动力连接器针位图最合适。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: The target string is not visibly legible in the provided crop; the only plausible location is the bottom annotation strip indicated by the initial hint, so this box remains a low-confidence placement around that region.

drawing_metadata.authority_note: IMAGE 1 is the only source for visible text and coordinates.

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly as shown in IMAGE 1; do not infer unreadable labels.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Do not assume units unless explicitly shown; do not derive dimensions from appearance.
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Use standard mechanical connector terminology in English; keep Chinese source text intact in audit fields; classify uncertain labels as ambiguous.

mounting_interface.en: Circular flange-mounted connector face with four corner mounting holes.
mounting_interface.zh: 圆形法兰安装连接器端面，四角有安装孔。

shaft_and_key_interface.en: No shaft or key interface is visible in IMAGE 1.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: Overall envelope is not dimensioned in IMAGE 1; only the connector face outline and mounting pattern are visible.
overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: IMAGE 1未标注总体尺寸；仅可见连接器端面轮廓和安装孔布局。

connector_considerations.en: Multi-pin circular connector front view; small internal pin designators are not reliably legible.
connector_considerations.zh: 多针圆形连接器正视图；内部针脚标识过小，无法可靠辨认。

missing_or_unresolved_data.en: No authoritative dimensions are visible in IMAGE 1, and most internal pin labels remain unreadable.
missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: IMAGE 1中未见权威尺寸标注，且大多数内部针脚标识不可读。

unresolved_items: Tiny inner pin designators on the circular connector are not legible enough for authoritative transcription from IMAGE 1.
No visible dimensional callouts are present in IMAGE 1.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 该图为反馈线针脚分配表，能直接看到针脚字母 A、B、E、F、G、H、J 等与信号 'SD+'、'SD-'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'+5V'、'GND'、'SHIELD' 及线色 '蓝 BLUE'、'黄 YELLOW'、'棕 BROWN'、'白 WHITE'、'红 RED'、'黑 BLACK' 的对应关系，符合反馈连接器针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 裁剪区显示型号 'CMS3102A20-29PE009-A' 的圆形多芯连接器外形；结合完整标注图中该型号位于反馈线表格的连接器型号栏，并对应左侧含 A/T 等针脚编号及 SD+、SD-、+5V、GND、SHIELD 等信号定义的反馈接线表，因此属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

drawing_metadata.source_authority: IMAGE 1 only for text and coordinates; IMAGE 2 used only for context
drawing_metadata.detected_view_zh: 连接器细节/反馈连接器端面
drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Millimeters only for mechanical drawing context; no dimensional values visible in target crop

language_processing_rules.audit_language: Chinese source text preserved when visible; engineering audit notes bilingual where useful
language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: No invisible or context-only text was transcribed from IMAGE 2; uncertain tiny pin marks in IMAGE 1 were omitted
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No direct unit-bearing dimensions visible in IMAGE 1; no unit conversion applied
ambiguous_terms: Tiny internal pin identifiers or markings may be present but are not legible enough in IMAGE 1 for authoritative transcription

mounting_interface.zh: 目标图显示方形法兰式圆形连接器端面，四角有安装螺钉/孔位特征；未见可读孔径、孔距或型号尺寸。
mounting_interface.en: The target view shows a square-flange circular connector face with four corner mounting screw/hole features; no readable hole size, spacing, or model dimensions are visible.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 该区域为连接器细节，与轴、键或键槽接口无直接关系。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: This region is a connector detail and does not provide shaft, key, or keyway interface data.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 目标图未给出连接器外形尺寸、突出高度或安装间隙数值。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: No connector envelope, projection, or clearance dimensions are given in the target crop.

connector_considerations.zh: 根据上下文该视图属于反馈/编码器连接器端面示意，但型号文字和针位定义未能从目标图可靠读取。
connector_considerations.en: Context indicates this is the feedback/encoder connector face detail, but connector model text and pin assignments are not reliably readable from the target image.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 缺少可确认的连接器型号、针位标识、引脚功能、安装孔尺寸和外形尺寸。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Confirmed connector model, pin labels, pin functions, mounting-hole dimensions, and envelope dimensions are missing or unresolved.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 目标裁剪图中未见清晰可读的工程文字或尺寸标注；连接器内部可能有极小针位字母/数字，但无法可靠识别。
unresolved_items.issue_en: No clearly readable engineering text or dimensional callout is visible in the target crop; very small possible pin identifiers inside the connector cannot be reliably transcribed.
unresolved_items.impact: No authoritative text annotations or dimension records returned for this region.
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Use a higher-resolution crop or the original vector/PDF layer for connector model and pinout text extraction.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框为'电机性能参数Motor performance parameters'表格，包含额定转矩8.27 N·m、最大转矩24.81 N·m、额定转速1500 rpm、最大转速3500 rpm等电机转矩与转速性能数据；全图同页还标有性能曲线区域，工程含义最接近电机转矩-转速性能类别。

text_annotations.correction_note: Added spaces according to visible title; duplicate overlapping OCR fragments omitted.
Normalized comma punctuation from OCR full-width comma.
OCR merged adjacent y-axis tick labels into 2015; corrected to visible tick labels 20 and 15.

Added space in English phrase; duplicate overlapping OCR fragments omitted.
Normalized comma punctuation from OCR full-width comma.
Kept one origin tick label and omitted overlapping duplicate OCR zeros.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: RPM for speed axis and N.m for torque axis as visibly labeled

terminology_notes: OCR source boxes are retained only where they correspond to visible chart text; overlapping duplicate fragments and non-text shape detections are omitted.
translation_notes: workspace is interpreted as operating region/work area in the performance curve context.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Performance curve equipped with Kinco driver
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 配步科驱动器的性能曲线
dimension_records.reason: Top centered title identifies the chart content and driver context.
Vertical axis label and unit define the y-axis quantity.
Bottom axis label defines the x-axis quantity.
Interior label names the upper operating region of the curve.
Interior label names the lower operating region of the curve.
Coordinate callout appears on the upper short-term torque curve plateau.
Coordinate callout is placed at the knee of the continuous workspace curve.
Coordinate callout belongs to the upper descending short-term curve endpoint.
Coordinate callout belongs to the lower continuous curve endpoint.
Tick labels are axis scale references; 15 and 20 are corrected from merged OCR.
Tick labels are axis scale references; one OCR zero is used as the visible origin tick.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 图中是编码器性能参数表，标题为‘编码器性能参数Encoder performance parameters’，内容包含‘类型Type’和‘分辨率Resolution’等规格信息，不属于扭矩转速曲线或针脚接线定义；在现有类别中最接近机械类规格图信息。
